title: 3D Bookshelf Variants
description: Vanilla Tweaks 3D Bookshelf Variants support for More Bookshelf and Lectern Variants
body:
# Overview

Finally released these models as a standalone resourcepack from our modpack [CoreCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/corecraft/version/2.0.0-beta1).

This resourcepack makes [More Bookshelf Variants](https://modrinth.com/project/twjW6Ggd) and [More Lectern Variants](https://modrinth.com/project/pLsa93bN) 3D.

Version 1: 3D Bookshelves

Version 2: 3D Variated Bookshelves

For 3D oak bookshelf and lectern, please download it from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) in the 3D section.

![3D Spruce Chiseled Bookshelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/InkhhXaF/images/690594a0ca526c7f17d3f7f3d232247cefd11bcd.webp)

For **3D Chiseled Bookshelves**, check out: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-chiseled-bookshelf-variants
Check out similar projects here: https://modrinth.com/collection/N35iau5q

# Credits
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/ (Especially [Stridey](https://modrinth.com/user/31j7L936) for the vanilla models)
- More Bookshelf Variants: https://modrinth.com/mod/more-bookshelf-variants-lieonlion
- More Lectern Variants: https://modrinth.com/mod/more-lectern-variants
